notes:
ww.exe has to be run manually indeed from /home/YOURUSERNAME/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/common/Wacky Wheels/Wacky Wheels/


Also: the acceleration does not work by default with up arrow; it is alt by default. Don't remember is alt was the default back in the day. 
Change this through setup.exe via DOSbox in the same /home/YOURUSERNAME/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/common/Wacky Wheels/Wacky Wheels/ -folder


PS. If it comes cumbersome to locate the install directory via Steam / DOSbox window: just copy the "Wacky Wheels" folder from where Steam put it, to for example Downloads /home/tux/Downloads/ and type ww from there to start the game.
title: Wacky Wheels
